Hello, Mr. Lima. I am calling about our meeting. Are you free next week?
Hello, Anna. Let me check my calendar. I am busy on Monday and Tuesday.
Are you free on Wednesday? We are going to need one hour.
Yes, Wednesday is good. What time are we going to meet?
At two o'clock. I am going to send you a calendar invite today.
Perfect. I am going to prepare the report. See you on Wednesday.

Hello Anna, this is Mr. Lima from the partner company. I am calling about our plans for next week. On Monday, we are going to send the new contract. On Wednesday, the team is going to visit your office at two o'clock. And on Friday, we are going to have a short meeting online. Please check your calendar and tell me if you are free on Wednesday. Thank you, and have a good week.

This is my plan for tomorrow. In the morning, I am going to check my emails and call a partner. At ten o'clock, I am going to have a meeting with my manager. After lunch, I am going to write a short report. I am not going to work in the afternoon, because I am going to leave early. Tomorrow is going to be a busy but good day.

First, Anna opens her calendar and checks her week. Then she calls the partner to make a plan. Next, they choose a day and a time for the meeting. After that, Anna writes the appointment in her calendar. Finally, she confirms the plan and says goodbye.
